name: chrome-release-cls
tagline: Given a Chrome Releases blog URL, extracts each CVE and finds the Gerrit CL that fixed it by searching a local Chromium checkout.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped research skill: concrete steps, explicit fallbacks for misses, deterministic repo-selection rules, and a clear output contract (per-severity table plus /tmp/cve_cls.txt). Minor gaps: no declared curl/python3 requirement check and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: curl and python3 are invoked throughout (line 21: 'curl -sL "$URL" | python3 -c') with no upfront requirements section or availability check.
No version field and no changelog/dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
